'''dhashugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibung|nibung]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-sh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibung|nibung]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhashugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæshigith|dhæshigith]] || [[word:dhæshigij|dhæshigij]] || [[word:dhæshigish|dhæshigish]] || [[word:dhæshigi|dhæshigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhashushuguth|dhashushuguth]] || [[word:dhashushuguj|dhashushuguj]] || [[word:dhashushugush|dhashushugush]] || [[word:dhashushugu|dhashushugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhashuguth|dhashuguth]] || [[word:dhashuguj|dhashuguj]] || [[word:dhashugush|dhashugush]] || [[word:dhashugu|dhashugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhashufguth|dhashufguth]] || [[word:dhashufguj|dhashufguj]] || [[word:dhashufgush|dhashufgush]] || [[word:dhashufguf|dhashufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhashuguthu|dhashuguthu]] || [[word:dhashuguju|dhashuguju]] || [[word:dhashugushu|dhashugushu]] || [[word:dhashuguku|dhashuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhashuguth|dhashuguth]] || [[word:dhashuguj|dhashuguj]] || [[word:dhashugush|dhashugush]] || [[word:dhashugu|dhashugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhashuguthul|dhashuguthul]] || [[word:dhashugujul|dhashugujul]] || [[word:dhashugushul|dhashugushul]] || [[word:dhashugukul|dhashugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhashuguthuthu|dhashuguthuthu]] || [[word:dhashugujuju|dhashugujuju]] || [[word:dhashugushushu|dhashugushushu]] || [[word:dhashuguku|dhashuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhashuguthun|dhashuguthun]] || [[word:dhashugujun|dhashugujun]] || [[word:dhashugushun|dhashugushun]] || [[word:dhashugukun|dhashugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhashuguthuoro|dhashuguthuoro]] || [[word:dhashugujuoro|dhashugujuoro]] || [[word:dhashugushuoro|dhashugushuoro]] || [[word:dhashugukuoro|dhashugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
